assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response explicitly addresses compatibility checking with specific commands to verify Istio version and mentions that Istio 1.20+ supports K8s 1.32, while 1.18-1.19 may have issues

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: The response explicitly mentions checking the Istio/Kubernetes compatibility matrix and provides specific version requirements (Istio 1.20+ for K8s 1.32)

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response clearly states 'If your Istio version is < 1.20: Upgrade Istio BEFORE upgrading GKE to avoid API compatibility issues'

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: The response extensively covers admission webhooks including mutating webhook configurations, provides troubleshooting for webhook failures, and explains testing sidecar injection during node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: The response includes commands to verify sidecar injection on new nodes and emphasizes validating mesh functionality on upgraded nodes during the soak period

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: The response includes checking for version skew in the data plane with 'istioctl proxy-status | grep -v SYNCED' and emphasizes monitoring proxy sync status

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: The response provides multiple specific commands including 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app=istiod -o jsonpath', 'istioctl proxy-status', 'istioctl version --remote', and various other istioctl commands

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: The response addresses version compatibility issues and includes troubleshooting for traffic disruption, mentions checking for version skew, and provides recovery procedures for when the service mesh breaks
